description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 7/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for schema coercion, missing required context, malformed output,
  invalid repair, and `output: :raw`.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Added edge-case coverage for schema key coercion, invalid repaired output, and raw-mode behavior. Also fixed context schema normalization so string keys matching declared atom fields are parsed without creating atoms.

title: E3: Add tests for schema coercion, missing required context, malformed output, inva...
